__comment: KnitLens Cursor hooks configuration scaffold. `categories` are design docs; `hooks` matches Cursor's official hooks.json schema.

foundation.description: App Router structure, fixed stack, and separation of concerns.

hooks.name: foundation.app-router-structure
hooks.description: When files under app/ are created or edited, check that App Router conventions are followed (page.tsx, layout.tsx, route.ts) and flag suspicious file placement.
checks: TODO: Detect route files that do not follow Next.js App Router naming (page.tsx, layout.tsx, route.ts).
TODO: Warn when deeply nested files under app/ look like shared UI that should instead live under the shared components directory.

hooks.name: foundation.db-logic-in-ui
hooks.description: Warn when DB logic or raw SQL appears inside UI components (pages, layouts, presentational components).
checks: TODO: Look for imports of Supabase clients, SQL strings, or direct DB helpers inside UI files.
TODO: Suggest moving DB access into server-only helpers (e.g., lib/ or server/ modules).

hooks.name: foundation.duplicate-shared-ui
hooks.description: Warn when similar UI blocks are duplicated instead of being extracted into shared retro wrapper components.
checks: TODO: Heuristically detect repeated JSX structures that could be shared retro primitives (e.g., window shells, toolbars, panels).

serverVsClient.description: Server Components by default; Client Components only for necessary interactivity.

hooks.name: server-vs-client.new-use-client
hooks.description: Detect new "use client" additions and require a short justification comment or note.
checks: TODO: Detect added "use client" directives.
TODO: Warn if no nearby comment or note explains why client-side behavior is required.

hooks.name: server-vs-client.large-client-component
hooks.description: Warn when large components are marked as client unnecessarily (too many lines or responsibilities).
checks: TODO: Approximate component size (lines/complexity) and warn when large client components might be split into server + small client wrappers.

hooks.name: server-vs-client.client-data-fetching
hooks.description: Warn if data fetching is moved into client components without a clear reason.
checks: TODO: Detect fetch/Supabase/DB helper calls inside client components and suggest moving them to server code unless strictly necessary.

uiRetro.description: Retro Macintosh-style UI and system.css design baseline.

hooks.name: ui-retro.disallowed-modern-effects
hooks.description: Detect styling patterns that violate the retro system.css baseline (large shadows, glassmorphism, strong blur, oversized radius, heavy gradients, excessive animation).
checks: TODO: Search for CSS/Tailwind patterns such as box-shadow with large blur/spread, backdrop-filter: blur, very large border-radius, and gradient-heavy backgrounds.
TODO: Warn on long or complex animation/transition definitions that do not match retro expectations.

hooks.name: ui-retro.missing-system-css-wrappers
hooks.description: Warn when system.css-friendly wrapper components are not used where they should be.
checks: TODO: Heuristically detect repeated window/panel/button patterns that should use shared retro primitives instead of inline markup and classes.

aiJsonIntegrity.description: LLM routes must use JSON-only contracts, schema validation, and raw text preservation.

hooks.name: ai-json.routes-require-schemas
hooks.description: For LLM routes or AI handlers, require presence of input/output schemas and runtime validation.
checks: TODO: Detect definitions of input/output types and corresponding runtime validators.
TODO: Block or strongly warn when AI routes lack explicit schemas or validation.

hooks.name: ai-json.json-only-response-handling
hooks.description: Require JSON-only response handling for AI routes and warn if free-form or markdown output is relied on.
checks: TODO: Ensure responses are parsed and returned as JSON objects only.
TODO: Detect patterns that directly render or store arbitrary text from LLMs without enforcing JSON structure.

hooks.name: ai-json.raw-text-preservation
hooks.description: Warn if raw source text preservation is missing when using LLMs to transform user or external text.
checks: TODO: Heuristically check that raw input text is stored or passed alongside structured LLM output.

hooks.name: ai-json.provider-in-client-code
hooks.description: Warn or block if LLM provider calls appear in client-side code.
checks: TODO: Detect imports of LLM SDKs or provider clients in client components and require calls to go through server routes or actions instead.

supabaseData.description: Supabase DB logic must stay in server-only modules and out of presentational UI.

hooks.name: supabase.client-in-client-component
hooks.description: Warn or block if Supabase client usage appears inside Client Components.
checks: TODO: Detect imports of Supabase client libraries and their usage in files marked with "use client".

hooks.name: supabase.db-logic-in-ui
hooks.description: Warn if DB access logic is mixed into presentational UI components.
checks: TODO: Look for direct table queries or DB helper calls inside components that primarily render UI.
TODO: Suggest moving DB logic into dedicated server-only helpers or route handlers.

hooks.name: supabase.encourage-server-helpers
hooks.description: Encourage use of server-only helpers or route handlers for Supabase CRUD instead of inline logic.
checks: TODO: Nudge toward central Supabase CRUD helpers for each entity and discourage ad-hoc queries scattered across the codebase.
